jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Pepperfry
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
